lines.english: Lesson 30
lines.chinese: 第30课
lines.raw: Lesson 30 | 第30课

lines.english: The death of a ghost
lines.chinese: 幽灵之死
lines.raw: The death of a ghost | 幽灵之死

lines.english: Why did the two brothers keep the secret?
lines.chinese: 为什么两兄弟保守了这个秘密？
lines.raw: Why did the two brothers keep the secret? | 为什么两兄弟保守了这个秘密？

lines.english: For years, villagers believed that Endley farm was haunted.
lines.chinese: 多年来，村民们一直认为恩德利农场闹鬼。
lines.raw: For years, villagers believed that Endley farm was haunted. | 多年来，村民们一直认为恩德利农场闹鬼。

lines.english: The farm was owned by two brothers, Joe and Bob Cox.
lines.chinese: 这个农场归乔和鲍勃·科克斯两兄弟所有。
lines.raw: The farm was owned by two brothers, Joe and Bob Cox. | 这个农场归乔和鲍勃·科克斯两兄弟所有。

lines.english: They employed a few farmhands, but no one was willing to work there long.
lines.chinese: 他们雇了一些农场工人，但没有人愿意在那里长时间工作。
lines.raw: They employed a few farmhands, but no one was willing to work there long. | 他们雇了一些农场工人，但没有人愿意在那里长时间工作。

lines.english: Every time a worker gave up his job, he told the same story.
lines.chinese: 每次有工人辞职，他们都会讲同样的故事。
lines.raw: Every time a worker gave up his job, he told the same story. | 每次有工人辞职，他们都会讲同样的故事。

lines.english: Farm labourers said that they always woke up to find that work had been done overnight.
lines.chinese: 农场工人说，他们醒来时总是发现工作已经在一夜之间完成了。
lines.raw: Farm labourers said that they always woke up to find that work had been done overnight. | 农场工人说，他们醒来时总是发现工作已经在一夜之间完成了。

lines.english: Hay had been cut and cowsheds had been cleaned.
lines.chinese: 干草被割了，牛棚也被清理了。
lines.raw: Hay had been cut and cowsheds had been cleaned. | 干草被割了，牛棚也被清理了。

lines.english: A farm worker, who stayed up all night, claimed to have seen a figure cutting corn in the moonlight.
lines.chinese: 一位彻夜未眠的农场工人声称在月光下看到一个身影在割玉米。
lines.raw: A farm worker, who stayed up all night, claimed to have seen a figure cutting corn in the moonlight. | 一位彻夜未眠的农场工人声称在月光下看到一个身影在割玉米。

lines.english: In time, it became an accepted fact that the Cox brothers employed a conscientious ghost that did most of their work for them.
lines.chinese: 渐渐地，科克斯兄弟雇佣了一个尽职尽责的幽灵为他们做了大部分工作，这成了一个公认的事实。
lines.raw: In time, it became an accepted fact that the Cox brothers employed a conscientious ghost that did most of their work for them. | 渐渐地，科克斯兄弟雇佣了一个尽职尽责的幽灵为他们做了大部分工作，这成了一个公认的事实。

lines.english: No one suspected that there might be someone else on the farm who had never been seen.
lines.chinese: 没有人怀疑农场上可能还有其他人从未被见过。
lines.raw: No one suspected that there might be someone else on the farm who had never been seen. | 没有人怀疑农场上可能还有其他人从未被见过。

lines.english: This was indeed the case.
lines.chinese: 事实确实如此。
lines.raw: This was indeed the case. | 事实确实如此。

lines.english: A short time ago, villagers were astonished to learn that the ghost of Endley had died.
lines.chinese: 不久前，村民们惊讶地得知恩德利的幽灵已经死了。
lines.raw: A short time ago, villagers were astonished to learn that the ghost of Endley had died. | 不久前，村民们惊讶地得知恩德利的幽灵已经死了。

lines.english: Everyone went to the funeral, for the 'ghost' was none other than Eric Cox,
lines.chinese: 所有人都去参加了葬礼，因为那个“幽灵”不是别人，正是埃里克·科克斯，
lines.raw: Everyone went to the funeral, for the 'ghost' was none other than Eric Cox, | 所有人都去参加了葬礼，因为那个“幽灵”不是别人，正是埃里克·科克斯，

lines.english: a third brother who was supposed to have died as a young man.
lines.chinese: 据说他年轻时就去世了的第三个兄弟。
lines.raw: a third brother who was supposed to have died as a young man. | 据说他年轻时就去世了的第三个兄弟。

lines.english: After the funeral, Joe and Bob revealed a secret which they had kept for over fifty years.
lines.chinese: 葬礼结束后，乔和鲍勃揭露了一个他们保守了五十多年的秘密。
lines.raw: After the funeral, Joe and Bob revealed a secret which they had kept for over fifty years. | 葬礼结束后，乔和鲍勃揭露了一个他们保守了五十多年的秘密。

lines.english: Eric had been the eldest son of the family, very much older than his two brothers.
lines.chinese: 埃里克是家里的长子，比他的两个兄弟大得多。
lines.raw: Eric had been the eldest son of the family, very much older than his two brothers. | 埃里克是家里的长子，比他的两个兄弟大得多。

lines.english: He had been obliged to join the army during the Second World War.
lines.chinese: 第二次世界大战期间，他被迫参军。
lines.raw: He had been obliged to join the army during the Second World War. | 第二次世界大战期间，他被迫参军。

lines.english: As he hated army life, he decided to desert his regiment.
lines.chinese: 由于他厌恶军队生活，他决定开小差。
lines.raw: As he hated army life, he decided to desert his regiment. | 由于他厌恶军队生活，他决定开小差。

lines.english: When he learnt that he would be sent abroad,
lines.chinese: 当他得知自己将被派往国外时，
lines.raw: When he learnt that he would be sent abroad, | 当他得知自己将被派往国外时，

lines.english: he returned to the farm and his father hid him until the end of the war.
lines.chinese: 他回到了农场，他的父亲把他藏起来直到战争结束。
lines.raw: he returned to the farm and his father hid him until the end of the war. | 他回到了农场，他的父亲把他藏起来直到战争结束。

lines.english: Fearing the authorities, Eric remained in hiding after the war as well.
lines.chinese: 由于害怕当局，埃里克在战后也一直躲藏着。
lines.raw: Fearing the authorities, Eric remained in hiding after the war as well. | 由于害怕当局，埃里克在战后也一直躲藏着。

lines.english: His father told everybody that Eric had been killed in action.
lines.chinese: 他的父亲告诉所有人埃里克在战斗中牺牲了。
lines.raw: His father told everybody that Eric had been killed in action. | 他的父亲告诉所有人埃里克在战斗中牺牲了。

lines.english: The only other people who knew the secret were Joe and Bob.
lines.chinese: 唯一知道这个秘密的其他人是乔和鲍勃。
lines.raw: The only other people who knew the secret were Joe and Bob. | 唯一知道这个秘密的其他人是乔和鲍勃。

lines.english: They did not even tell their wives.
lines.chinese: 他们甚至没有告诉他们的妻子。
lines.raw: They did not even tell their wives. | 他们甚至没有告诉他们的妻子。

lines.english: When their father died they thought it their duty to keep Eric in hiding.
lines.chinese: 当他们的父亲去世后，他们认为有责任继续把埃里克藏起来。
lines.raw: When their father died they thought it their duty to keep Eric in hiding. | 当他们的父亲去世后，他们认为有责任继续把埃里克藏起来。

lines.english: All these years, Eric had lived as a recluse.
lines.chinese: 这么多年来，埃里克一直过着隐居生活。
lines.raw: All these years, Eric had lived as a recluse. | 这么多年来，埃里克一直过着隐居生活。

lines.english: He used to sleep during the day and work at night,
lines.chinese: 他白天睡觉，晚上工作，
lines.raw: He used to sleep during the day and work at night, | 他白天睡觉，晚上工作，

lines.english: quite unaware of the fact that he had become the ghost of Endley.
lines.chinese: 完全没有意识到自己已经成为了恩德利的幽灵。
lines.raw: quite unaware of the fact that he had become the ghost of Endley. | 完全没有意识到自己已经成为了恩德利的幽灵。

lines.english: When he died, however, his brothers found it impossible to keep the secret any longer.
lines.chinese: 然而，当他去世后，他的兄弟们发现再也无法保守这个秘密了。
lines.raw: When he died, however, his brothers found it impossible to keep the secret any longer. | 然而，当他去世后，他的兄弟们发现再也无法保守这个秘密了。
